$comment: scripts/ChampionsRoom.asm — walking in is the trigger, not talking: beating AGATHA arms SCRIPT_CHAMPIONSROOM_PLAYER_ENTERS, and the next load marches the player up the room (RivalEntrance_RLEMovement UP1,RIGHT1,UP3 plays in REVERSE of its declaration — the sim joypad consumes from the end down, gh #182 — so UP ×3, RIGHT, UP to (4,3)) straight into the final battle (the same body as champions_room_battle). Without it he can be walked around — the Hall of Fame stairs at (3,0)/(4,0) are reachable from the door. The armed script pointer is consumed by the walk-in.

commands.text:
{rival}: Hey! I was looking
forward to seeing
you, {player}! My rival should
be strong to keep
me sharp! And now! I'm the POKéMON
LEAGUE champion! Do you know what
that means?

then.text:
NO!
That can't be!
You beat my best! After all that
work to become
LEAGUE champ? My reign is over
already?
It's not fair!

Why?
Why did I lose? I never made any
mistakes raising
my POKéMON... Darn it! You're
the new POKéMON
LEAGUE champion! Although I don't
like to admit it.

OAK: So, you won!
Congratulations!
You're the new
POKéMON LEAGUE
champion! You've grown up so
much since you
first left with
BULBASAUR! {player}, you have
come of age!

OAK: So, you won!
Congratulations!
You're the new
POKéMON LEAGUE
champion! You've grown up so
much since you
first left with
CHARMANDER! {player}, you have
come of age!

else.text:
OAK: So, you won!
Congratulations!
You're the new
POKéMON LEAGUE
champion! You've grown up so
much since you
first left with
SQUIRTLE! {player}, you have
come of age!

then.text:
OAK: {rival}! I'm
disappointed! I came when I
heard you beat
the ELITE FOUR! But, when I got
here, you had
already lost! {rival}! Do you
understand why
you lost? You have forgotten
to treat your
POKéMON with
trust and love! Without them, you
will never become
a champ again!

OAK: {player}! You understand
that your victory
was not just your
own doing! The bond you share
with your POKéMON
is marvelous! {player}!
Come with me!
